economic_notes: Fort Albany Power Corporation (100% owned GBE) provides hydro-electric power distribution. 25% interest in Kimesskanemenow LP (winter road construction). 25% interest in Creewest LP (contracting opportunities). Minority interest in Mushkegowuk Development Corporation and Ontario First Nations Sovereign Wealth LP.
notes: Audit opinion is QUALIFIED - reason is that the consolidated statements do not present a comparison with planned budget amounts, which is a departure from Canadian PSAB standards. Consolidated entities include Fort Albany First Nation Band, Mundo Peetabeck Education Authority, and Peetabeck Health Services. Fort Albany Power Corporation is accounted for using the modified equity method (GBE). Fiscal year end for the GBE is December 31. Net financial assets of $8,533,177. Long-term debt details (CMHC mortgages) were partially cut off in the provided text. ISC funding calculated as flexible + fixed + block funding (6,703,479 + 5,130,637 + 14,451,647). Total government transfers include ISC, CMHC, FNHIB, and Province of Ontario. Community Development expenses of $10,276,969 and Community Services O&M of $6,791,025 are not mapped to standard categories. New accounting standards PS 3280 and PS 3450 adopted April 1, 2022 prospectively.
